Latent Spatial Memory for Video World Models
articles.excerpt: Video world models that maintain 3D spatial consistency across generated frames typically rely on explicit point cloud memory constructed in RGB space. This design is both computationally expensive, requiring repeated rendering and VAE encoding, and inherently lossy, as the round trip through pixel space discards rich features of the learned latent representation. In this paper, we introduce laten
articles.summary: 视频世界模型通常依赖RGB点云记忆以保持3D一致性，但计算昂贵且有损。该工作引入潜在空间记忆，直接在潜在特征空间维护3D一致性，避免反复渲染与VAE编码，保留丰富特征，提升效率与生成质量。

articles.title: OmniGameArena: A Unified UE5 Benchmark for VLM Game Agents with Improvement Dynamics
articles.excerpt: Vision-language model (VLM) agents are increasingly deployed in interactive game environments. Yet game benchmarks for VLM agents typically report a single first-attempt score per (agent, game) pair, focus on single-agent Solo play, and lack unified protocols for evaluating heterogeneous agent classes (commercial VLMs, open-weight VLMs, and specialized game policies) on the same footing. We addres
articles.summary: 现有VLM游戏基准仅报告首次得分、限于单人模式且缺乏统一评估协议。OmniGameArena基于UE5构建统一基准，支持商业VLM、开源VLM和专用游戏策略的横向对比，并引入改进动态评估，更全面衡量智能体学习能力。

articles.title: Echo-Memory: A Controlled Study of Memory in Action World Models
articles.excerpt: We present Echo-Memory, a controlled study of memory mechanisms in action-conditioned world models. These models generate multi-segment videos from a first frame, text prompt, and camera-action sequence, but their central failure is often memory rather than local image synthesis: after the camera leaves and returns, the scene or salient object may silently change. Existing memory designs are hard
articles.summary: 动作条件世界模型生成多段视频时，常因记忆不足导致场景重访时物体变化。Echo-Memory对记忆机制进行受控研究，系统分析现有记忆设计缺陷，提出改进方向，提升世界模型在长期交互中的场景一致性。

articles.title: Bridging the Agent-World Gap: Text World Models for LLM-based Agents
articles.excerpt: Large language model (LLM)-based agents are increasingly used in interactive textual environments, from web navigation and code editing to tool use and long-horizon dialogue. Yet many remain largely reactive, mapping observations to actions without an explicit model of how these environments are structured and evolve. This motivates text world models (TWMs): transition models over textual states t
articles.summary: LLM智能体在文本环境中多为反应式，缺乏对环境结构与演变的显式建模。该工作提出文本世界模型（TWM），对文本状态间的转移进行建模，使智能体具备前瞻规划能力，提升在网页导航、代码编辑等任务中的表现。

articles.title: A case study of evaluating AI agents on a neuroscience data-to-discovery pipeline
articles.excerpt: Agentic AI tools offer a promising path to automating software development bottlenecks in scientific research pipelines, particularly for stages that take domain experts days to months to build, where scientists care about correctness and robustness, not implementation details. We present an empirical study of general-purpose coding agents on a fly optogenetics data-to-discovery pipeline. We asses
articles.summary: 在果蝇光遗传学数据到发现流程中，评估通用编码智能体自动化科研软件瓶颈的能力。智能体需完成多阶段任务，研究关注正确性和鲁棒性而非实现细节，为智能体在科学发现中的应用提供实证。

articles.title: AnchorWorld: Embodied Egocentric World Simulation with View-based Evolution Customization
articles.excerpt: Despite being a pivotal frontier, interactive world modeling remains underexplored in terms of the versatile controllability required by practical scenarios. To bridge this gap, we present AnchorWorld, a framework that advances egocentric simulation through enhanced interaction integrity and a flexible mechanism for world customization. First, we utilize 3D human motion as the primary interaction
articles.summary: 交互式世界模拟缺乏灵活可控性。AnchorWorld利用3D人体运动作为主要交互方式，支持基于视角的演化定制，实现高完整性的自我中心仿真，用户可自定义世界内容，拓展了具身AI和虚拟现实的应用。

articles.title: SWE-Explore: Benchmarking How Coding Agents Explore Repositories
articles.excerpt: Repository-level coding benchmarks such as SWE-bench have driven a rapid surge in the capabilities of coding agents. Yet they usually treat coding tasks as a holistic, binary prediction problem (e.g., resolved or unresolved), neglecting fine-grained agent capabilities such as repository understanding, context retrieval, code localization, and bug diagnosis. In this paper, we introduce SWE-Explore,
articles.summary: 现有仓库级编码基准将任务视为二分类，忽略智能体在仓库理解、上下文检索、代码定位和缺陷诊断等细粒度能力。SWE-Explore引入多维度评估指标，系统测试智能体在仓库探索中的分步表现，为改进编码智能体提供指导。

articles.title: From Correctness to Utility: Gain-Based Prefix Evaluation for LLM Reasoning
articles.excerpt: Reasoning prefixes shape the future trajectory of LLM problem solving, yet existing process reward models usually evaluate them through local step correctness. We argue that correctness is a useful but indirect proxy for the effect we ultimately care about: whether a prefix increases the probability of successful completion. We define this effect as prefix gain, the solve-rate improvement induced
articles.summary: 过程奖励模型用局部正确性评估推理前缀，但正确性仅是间接代理。该工作提出前缀增益（prefix gain）——前缀对最终解决概率的提升作为评估标准，更直接反映前缀效用，优于传统正确性指标，能有效指导LLM推理优化。

articles.title: On the Geometry of On-Policy Distillation
articles.excerpt: On-policy distillation (OPD) is increasingly used to improve large language model reasoning, but its training dynamics remain poorly understood. We characterize the trajectory of OPD updates in parameter space and compare it with supervised fine-tuning (SFT) and reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards (RLVR). A suite of parameter-space diagnostics consistently places OPD in a relaxed off-pr
articles.summary: on-policy蒸馏（OPD）用于提升LLM推理，但其训练动力学未知。该工作从参数空间几何刻画OPD更新轨迹，与SFT和RLVR对比，表明OPD处于宽松off-policy状态，揭示其泛化与收敛特性的几何基础，为蒸馏方法设计提供理论依据。

articles.title: SlimSearcher: Training Efficiency-Aware Web Agents via Adaptive Reward Gating
articles.excerpt: Deep research agents have demonstrated remarkable capabilities in complex information-seeking tasks, yet this power comes at a steep computational cost. Driven by accuracy-focused training paradigms, current models adopt brute-force strategies characterized by blind tool dependency and performative reasoning-generating long, redundant trajectories that are far from necessary for resolving these ta
articles.summary: 深度研究智能体虽能力强大但计算成本高昂，因准确率导向训练导致冗余轨迹。SlimSearcher引入自适应奖励门控，在训练中鼓励短路径与高效工具使用，生成简洁推理链，保持准确率的同时大幅降低计算开销，适用于实际信息检索场景。

articles.excerpt: The Indonesian political system has enabled deforestation through weak oversight, opaque licensing, and regulations designed to favor extractive industries.
